Interface Visualize

All Superinterfaces:
Action, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ViewComponent, ViewShipBoard
public interface Visualize extends Action

    • execute

      default ClientState execute(ClientState state)
      Description copied from interface: Action
      Executes the action on the given client state.

      Parameters:
      state - The current state of the client.
      Returns:
      The updated client state after executing the action.

    • isVisualize

      default boolean isVisualize()
      Description copied from interface: Action
      Checks if the action should be visualized. By default, actions are not visualized.
      Specified by:
      isVisualize in interface Action
      Returns:
      true if the action should be visualized, false otherwise.
